summary: Iteration 31 - Enterprise Subscription Testing Complete. All 10 subscription plans generate valid Stripe checkout URLs. Fixed critical bugs: 1) Frontend optimisation plan IDs (starter_2k → opti_starter_2k), 2) Frontend addon IDs to match backend ADDON_OPTIONS, 3) Added separate handleAddonSubscribe function for addon checkout. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Optimisation plan IDs mismatch - frontend used 'starter_2k' and 'starter_3k' but backend expects 'opti_starter_2k' and 'opti_starter_3k'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed plan IDs to match backend SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Addon IDs mismatch - frontend used incorrect IDs like 'extra_ads', 'investors', 'local' etc. but backend expects 'pub_extra', 'investors_access', 'local_access' etc.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated all addon IDs to match backend ADDON_OPTIONS

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Addon 'Ajouter' button was calling subscription checkout instead of addon checkout endpoint
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added handleAddonSubscribe function that calls subscriptionsAPI.createAddonCheckout and updated button onClick

critical_code_review_comments: activate_subscription correctly stores in both db.subscriptions AND db.enterprise_subscriptions collections - bug fix verified
get_enterprise_subscription_tier correctly reads from db.enterprise_subscriptions - algorithm access working
Activity feed algorithm correctly restricts premium features (market_trend, investment_opportunity) to premium/optimisation tiers
All 10 subscription plans have correct tier assignments: basic (standard, guest), premium (premium, premium_mvp), optimisation (opti_* plans)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription features verified working: 1) All 10 plans (standard, guest, premium, premium_mvp, opti_starter_2k, opti_starter_3k, opti_5k, opti_10k, opti_20k, opti_50k) generate valid Stripe checkout URLs. 2) Addon checkout endpoint works for all addon options. 3) Enterprise subscription status returns correct tier and ads_limit based on plan. 4) Activity feed algorithm correctly restricts premium features to premium/optimisation tiers. Fixed frontend plan/addon ID mismatches.
